name: Painted Ceramic Taper Candle Holder - Threshold™
description:
Enhance the ambiance of your home with this Painted Ceramic Taper Candle Holder from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this candle holder features beautiful blue paint designs on a white backdrop for an elegant look. It features a spindle-like body and has cup-shaped top to hold a taper candle. Place it on your tabletop or mantel to cast a soft, gentle glow.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
